description: Daisy and Lincoln recover from the news about the Zephyr One’s capture. Lincoln encourages Daisy to act despite her fears of the vision, and together they resolve to call in the Secret Warriors to mount a rescue for their teammates.

transcript.line: May? May? May? Line's dead. Everyone from our team is on that plane.
Not everyone. You put together the Secret Warriors Initiative for a reason.
You can't be afraid of that vision. We both know we got to do something.
